title: Make release archive compression deterministic across platforms

sources.reason: Plan Work Item 4 requires deterministic, source-bound release archive verification.
The release workflow is the authoritative provider-side archive producer.
The regression contract verifies the archive bytes and declared release digest.
The superseded PR demonstrated that the prior branch was stale and its CI failed across Python platforms.

rawUserRequest: 完成 Conditional GO 计划中的跨平台 release archive 修复；必须从最新 origin/main 开始，修复 workflow 与回归契约的 gzip 字节一致性，并完成完整 PR/合并/关闭/清理生命周期。

declaredIntent.summary: Make release archive compression byte-for-byte deterministic across supported runners and preserve source-bound release evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: The change is limited to deterministic archive generation and its regression contract; no runtime or user data behavior changes.

executionDecision.reason: User authorization in the execution plan covers workflow, test, PR, merge, and lifecycle cleanup changes.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the workflow and shell regression use the same deterministic gzip stream on every supported runner.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The release workflow produces the canonical archive with explicit GzipFile mode, level 9, mtime 0, and the same tar source identity used by the preflight builder.
The release archive regression contract uses the same deterministic encoding and fails when the declared release digest differs.
The Work Item is based on the current origin/main and completes the full PR, merge, archive, close, branch cleanup, and base synchronization lifecycle.
guidelines: Keep provider-side release archive generation byte-for-byte aligned with the repository canonical archive builder.
Do not change release metadata or create a freeze marker in this repair Work Item.

intent.problem: The previous cross-platform archive PR was based on a stale pre-hardening branch and used an implementation that failed the supported Python runner matrix; the release workflow and shell contract must use one deterministic gzip byte stream.
constraints: Start from the exact latest origin/main commit.
Preserve the merged release-preflight and Work Item ownership hardening.
Do not bind final release metadata or freeze evidence before all Work Items are complete.
intent.rationale: A source-bound release cannot be published until the same canonical archive bytes are reproducible on all supported runners and the regression contract proves the declared digest.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Linux and macOS supported Python runners produce the declared archive digest
A stale or mismatched archive digest fails closed
PR is based directly on latest origin/main and contains one Work Item

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The execution plan explicitly authorizes workflow, test, PR, merge, and lifecycle changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
